PowerShell(npx next lint --file lib/actions/order.actions.ts --file lib/delivery/index.ts --file lib/delivery/types.ts --file lib/delivery/providers/modon.ts --file lib/delivery/providers/prime.ts --file "app/[locale]/admin/orders/orders-table.tsx" --file "app/[locale]/admin/orders/update-order-form.tsx" 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 40)
